title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build With AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Systems Architecture App
summary: A tutorial showing how to build a production SaaS application using an architecture-first workflow with AI agents for code generation. The project uses Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and integrates tools like Clerk for authentication, Trigger.dev for workflows, and Liveblocks for real-time collaboration.
